name: togekiss
flavor_texts: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.
It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
As everyone knows, it visits peaceful regions, bringing them gifts of kindness and sweet blessings.
These Pokémon are never seen anywhere near conflict or turmoil. In recent times, they’ve hardly been seen at all.
Known as a bringer of blessings, it’s been depicted on good-luck charms since ancient times.
Scant few have ever sighted this Pokémon. After studying what literature remains, I am certain Togekiss will reveal itself when peace reigns in the land.
text: Togekiss is the Jubilee Pokémon. It is a fairy and flying-type Pokémon. Abilities: hustle, serene-grace, super-luck (hidden). Base stats — HP: 85, Attack: 50, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 120, Sp. Def: 115, Speed: 80. Evolution line: togepi → togetic → togekiss. Lore: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently. It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife. As everyone knows, it visits peaceful regions, bringing them gifts of kindness and sweet blessings. These Pokémon are never seen anywhere near conflict or turmoil. In recent times, they’ve hardly been seen at all. Known as a bringer of blessings, it’s been depicted on good-luck charms since ancient times.
